# Password Generator — Evey

> Free online password generator. Cryptographically secure passwords, passphrases, and PINs with strength meter and entropy display. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://pass.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Developer Tools
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Generate cryptographically secure passwords
- Passphrase generation with word lists
- PIN generation
- Customizable length and character sets
- Password strength meter with entropy display
- Generation history
- One-click copy to clipboard

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
